name: Cyberse Sage
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Cynet Ritual". During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing materials mentioned on it from your field or GY, including a Cyberse monster. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can target 1 Cyberse monster or 1 Ritual Spell in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Cyberse Sage" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Cynet Ritual". During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing materials mentioned on it from your field or GY, including a Cyberse monster. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can target 1 Cyberse monster or 1 Ritual Spell in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Cyberse Sage" once per turn.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Cynet Ritual". During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing materials mentioned on it from your field or GY, including a Cyberse monster. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can target 1 Cyberse monster or 1 Ritual Spell in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Cyberse Sage" once per turn.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Activates if used as Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
